response:
Of course. Here is a poem template inspired by the "p.p.s."—that intimate, whispered afterthought at the end of a letter.

**P.P.S.**

The letter's done, the envelope's seal
Is waiting for the warmth of wax.
The formal script has said its piece,
The careful paragraphs relax.

The "Yours sincerely" finds its place,
The signature, a practiced art.
The mind moves on, the task is through...
But then—a tremor in the heart.

A ghost of thought, a sudden hue,
A memory that will not keep.
It flutters up from somewhere deep
Before the final, waking sleep.

So here it is, in smaller hand,
A little ragged at the start:
The thing I meant but didn't say,
The whisper of the truest heart.

The P.S. was an afterthought,
But this—this is the very seed.
The core that all the rest concealed,
The one essential, final need.

So, p.p.s., and p.p.s. alone:
I miss you more than ink can tell.
And all the words that came before
Were just a long and winding shell.

---

**Template for Your Own Use:**

**Title:** P.P.S.

[Stanza 1: Set the scene of conclusion]
The ________ is done, the ________ sealed,
The ________ finished, dry, and set.
The structured ________ laid to rest,
The formal promises are met.

[Stanza 2: The moment of the afterthought]
The closing ________ finds its line,
The ________, a deliberate mark.
The thought moves on, the work is through...
But then—a ________ in the dark.

[Stanza 3: Describe the afterthought's nature]
A ________, a sudden ________,
A ________ that would not keep.
It rises from a deeper well
Before the final, silent sleep.

[Stanza 4: Introduce the p.p.s. itself]
So here it is, in ________ hand,
A little ________, slightly torn:
The thing I felt but didn't say,
The ________ borne.

[Stanza 5: Contrast it with the main message]
The first was just an addendum,
But this—this is the very ________.
The ________ all the rest concealed,
The one true, unadorned ________.

[Stanza 6: Deliver the core p.p.s. message]
So, p.p.s., and p.p.s. alone:
________________________________.
And all the words that came before
Were just a ________________________________.
